# Basic Google Maps server functionality test

# Set aggressive timeout environment
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=3s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=2s
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=1500ms

# Start the Google Maps server in background
server_command 'go run main.go'

# Wait for server startup
wait 1s

# Test search_places tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test1", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "search_places", "arguments": {"query": "restaurant", "location": "San Francisco"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Places found'
stdout 'restaurant'
stdout 'Sample Restaurant'

# Test get_directions tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test2", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "get_directions", "arguments": {"origin": "San Francisco", "destination": "Oakland", "mode": "driving"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Directions from San Francisco to Oakland'
stdout 'driving'
stdout 'miles'

# Test geocode tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test3", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "geocode", "arguments": {"address": "123 Main St, San Francisco"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Geocoded address'
stdout 'Latitude'
stdout 'Longitude'

# Test reverse_geocode tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test4", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "reverse_geocode", "arguments": {"lat": 37.7749, "lng": -122.4194}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Reverse geocoded coordinates'
stdout 'San Francisco'

# Test get_place_details tool
echo '{"jsonrpc": "2.0", "id": "test5", "method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "get_place_details", "arguments": {"place_id": "ChIJd8BlQ2BZwokRAFUEcm_qrcA"}}}' | mcpspy
stdout 'Place Details'
stdout 'Sample Restaurant'
stdout 'Rating'
